summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trade Eligibility Gate System. All 33 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - eligibility badges, regime detection, sorting, and stats all working correctly.
passed_tests: Regime detection: TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN/CHOPPY/REVERSAL/UNKNOWN/SCALPER derived from price data
Eligibility gates: market open, regime trending, rfit >= 0.40, confidence >= 0.55, tier >= 3
Badge assignment: ACTIVE (green), NO TREND (grey), LOW FITNESS/CONF/TIER (amber), CLOSED (red)
Engine sorting: trending engines appear first, then open/closed, then by R.Fit
P&L formula: gross = dir_sign * (exit - entry) * quantity * multiplier verified
Stats include trending (13) and eligible (3) counts
Scalpers bypass regime check - always ACTIVE when open
Closed markets (24 stock engines on Saturday) correctly blocked from trading
Engine detail modal shows Eligibility, Regime, R.Fit, Confidence, Tier
Filter tabs work: All 50, Open Only, Markets, Crypto, Scalpers
Show Closed Markets checkbox toggles visibility of closed market engines
Live Trades panel shows trades with entry/exit prices and P&L
Performance Ranking shows top 5 and bottom 5 performers
seed_data_creation: None - system uses simulated price data for regime detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Eligibility Gate System fully implemented and tested. 50 engines running with regime detection. Currently Saturday so 24 stock market engines show CLOSED badge. Crypto engines (24 coins + 2 scalpers) are always open. Only engines with TRENDING regime + sufficient R.Fit/confidence/tier can trade. IB Broker falls back to MOCK mode. WebSocket provides real-time updates including trending/eligible counts.

mocked_api.Interactive Brokers: Falls back to mock order execution (broker_client.py)

sorting.order: trending first, then open/closed, then R.Fit descending
